name: users
sql:
CREATE TABLE users (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password TEXT NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  role TEXT NOT NULL,
  details TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

name: products
sql:
CREATE TABLE products (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  category TEXT NOT NULL,
  price REAL NOT NULL,
  unit TEXT NOT NULL,
  stock INTEGER NOT NULL,
  minOrder INTEGER,
  description TEXT,
  image TEXT,
  supplierId TEXT NOT NULL,
  supplierName TEXT NOT NULL,
  supplierLocation TEXT,
  rating REAL DEFAULT 0,
  reviews INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ratingCount INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  FOREIGN KEY (supplierId) REFERENCES users(id)
)

name: suppliers
sql:
CREATE TABLE suppliers (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            supplierName TEXT,
            shopName TEXT,
            address TEXT,
            image TEXT,
            lastUpdated TEXT
        )

name: customers
sql:
CREATE TABLE customers (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            fullName TEXT,
            phone TEXT,
            image TEXT,
            lastUpdated TEXT
        )
